narrative:
Precinct Liverpool Twp East (precinct in Columbiana County) has 1,325 registered voters, with 58.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.6%, a modest Republican lean of 4.1 percentage points.
